scripts.preview: concurrently -k "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:down && npm run db:up && sleep 3 && npm run prisma:migrate -w apps/api && npm run prisma:seed -w apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w packages/shared
scripts.test: npm run test:engine && npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.verify:quick: npm run verify:typecheck && npm run verify:test && npm run verify:secrets
scripts.verify: npm run verify:quick && npm run verify:build
